scene_input.scene_summary: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs looks up at the Prophet with gratitude in his eyes.
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs looks up at the Prophet with a grateful expression

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 185
schema_output.moral_lesson: Gratitude towards the Prophet and Allah

characters.name: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs
characters.appearance: tall, slender build, slightly stooped shoulders, off-white thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth head covering

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, flowing white thobe, deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs looked up at the Prophet with a grateful heart, feeling blessed to have received guidance from him.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. The interior of the Prophet's Mosque in Medina during the afternoon, with warm sunlight streaming through a series of arched windows above the prayer hall. The room is filled with a soft, golden light that casts a warm glow on the scene. ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs sits on a simple wooden bench, his eyes fixed on the central figure seen entirely from behind, dressed in a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs' face is filled with a look of deep gratitude, his eyes shining with appreciation. The central figure is seen in a dignified posture, one hand extended in a gentle gesture. The atmosphere is peaceful and serene, filled with a sense of devotion and gratitude. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, golden, and cream palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
